productDisplayName: ADIDAS Originals Men Porsche Design SP 2 Black Casual Shoes
description: A perfect blend of the latest in Porsche's futuristic car designs and adidas' sporty style, the Porsche Design SP 2 driving shoe from adidas originals comes in an elegant and innovative silhouette.UpperPerforated synthetic leather upper for absolute breathable comfortLeather overlay along the mid-length, with wraparound overlays at the backfootLacing system for a snug, customised FitPadded collar and tongue with a textile inner lining for comfort and optimum fitMildly padded footbed for all-day comfortHard back heel to lock the foot in placeMidsoleMesh insole for breathable comfortOutsoleDriving inspired outsole with a with horizontal grooves that reveal the mesh insole for absolute driving easeShoe careWipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dustDo not store in direct sunlight
